title: French Bliss Tart
description: A unique dessert combining the sweetness of banana and bliss with a tangy surprise from the pickle. This French-inspired tart is perfect for adventurous palates.
instructions: Roll out pastry dough and place in a tart pan.
Arrange banana slices on the dough, leaving a 1/2-inch border.
Fold the edges of the dough over the banana, pressing gently.
Spread thawed bliss over the banana, leaving a small border.
Top the bliss with chopped pickle.
Bake for 40-45 minutes or until the pastry is golden brown.
Serve warm, garnished with additional banana slices if desired.
Refrigerate leftovers and enjoy within 24 hours.
